[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000101 3
1 0001111010 5
2 0100011111 6
3 1101110101 7
4 1101010111 7
5 0011111011 7
6 0001000101 3
7 0000000101 2

01 10 0100001000 2
12 21 1100010101 5
23 32 1001010011 5
34 43 0001010011 4
45 54 0001000101 3 match 6
56 65 0000000101 2 match 7
67 76 0010000000 1
70 07 0000001010 2

13 31 1000110001 4
24 42 0101010111 6
35 53 0001100001 3
46 64 0110000101 4
57 75 0001100000 2
60 06 0100000000 1
71 17 0000111000 3

14 41 0100011101 5
25 52 0001000101 3 match 6
36 63 0000000001 1
47 74 0011011010 5
50 05 0000000000 a
61 16 0100000101 3 match 0
72 27 0001010010 3

26 62 0100000101 3 match 0
37 73 0001110010 4
